Both outputs address data model consolidation across multiple data platform layers. However, Output 1 uses more generic naming while Output 2 uses staging-specific prefixes, creating semantic divergence in presentation approach.

Average correctness score of 91.5, rounded to 92. Both outputs maintain high syntactic quality with proper markdown structure and consistent internal references.
